phase_outcomes.P4: Seal-confirm + docs + close (DOCS-ONLY, no code/capability change). Fixed the two inaccurate CLAUDE.md lines: (A) the A1+A2 enablement gate (~483) — was 'gated by settings.integrator responder config auto_implement.enabled'; now 'gated by the per-project settings.autoImplement.enabled (web-toggleable, default FALSE) composed with the daemon env master kill-switch PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_ENABLED (explicit-false ⇒ force OFF all; true or unset ⇒ defer to the per-project DB)'. (B) the 'config lives in settings.integrator' line (~506) — now 'Operator enablement is the per-project settings.autoImplement (enabled/mode, web-toggleable, default off/shadow) composed with the daemon env master; the deployment knobs (git url, budget caps, blast-radius allowlist, verify command) STAY env (daemon-wide); A1/A2 added no new MCP tool and no new env var'. (C) appended a per-project-control note to the A5 paragraph (~596) documenting web-toggleable enablement is the source of truth composed with the env master, deployment knobs stay env, new projects off by default, + the campaign roadmap link. responder README: added the env-master clarification to the A5 section (explicit-false⇒force-off-all; true/unset⇒defer-to-DB; mode default shadow overrides env per project) + a deployment-knobs-stay-env note (v1 exposes only enabled+mode per project) + FIXED the stale git-url env-table row (was 'REQUIRED when auto-implement is enabled' = a startup requirement; P2 dropped that ConfigError → now fail-safe at implement time: 'Set it on any responder that will have per-project auto-implement enabled; if a project resolves enabled with no url, worktree-prep fails safe (escalate-to-human, no crash) — not a startup error'). NO new seal test — the seal is already complete (P1 projects.test PATCH→GET round-trip of settings.autoImplement; P2 loop.test resolveAutoImplement composition + responderTick write-path on/off/master-off/fail-safe/new-project; the server-backed responder-seal.test A2/A3/A5 write-path seals seeded with settings.autoImplement read over the real HTTP getProject) — a redundant e2e would assert nothing those jointly guarantee. Whole-campaign suite green: shared 519/519, server 1732/1732 (responder-seal 11/11 isolated; the single full-run failure was a 5016ms load-induced testTimeout under concurrent CPU load on the A2 land seal, NOT a regression — passes clean in isolation), responder 206/206, web 486/486. build 7/7, typecheck 9/9, lint 9/9 all green. prettier --write on the 2 touched docs (README table re-padded by the wider git-url cell; CLAUDE.md unchanged); format:check clean. NO openapi:export/generate:api (docs-only, no API surface change). Ships safe-by-default (default off).
phase_outcomes.P3: Web per-project Auto-implement settings page. auto-implement-page.tsx mirrors conflict-resolution-page (structure) + integrator-page (Select primitive): enabled Switch (default off) + mode Select off/shadow/on (default shadow) + per-mode helper copy (shadow=observe/propose-without-landing, on=autonomous-verify-gate-is-floor) + a read-only note of the env master kill-switch + the env-only deployment knobs (git url/budget/allowlist/verify). useUpdateAutoImplementConfig read-merge-writes the TOP-LEVEL autoImplement block off a FRESH getProject ({...existing, autoImplement} preserves integrator/webhooks/ai_autonomy siblings — no clobber); invalidates detail+lists only. AutoImplementConfig type in api.ts. Route projectAutoImplementRoute (/settings/auto-implement) + sidebar NavLink gated currentProjectId && isAdmin (admin-only), Bot icon. ADMIN-GATED. web 486 (+4: admin gate, tolerant defaults, seeding, save-merge). typecheck/build/lint green. NO generate:api/server/responder/shared change. Operator flow: admin → Auto-implement nav → toggle Enabled + pick mode + Save; default off/shadow. 3de89de.
phase_outcomes.P2: Responder per-project resolution (the load-bearing phase). Env master FLIP (config.ts): PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_ENABLED → autoImplementMasterAllows = (env===undefined ? true : parseBool) — UNSET⇒defer-to-DB, explicit-false⇒force-off-ALL; default-off now comes from the DB (enabled:false), NOT the env (the trap avoided). mode parse kept as env fallback. DROPPED the startup git-url ConfigError → fail-safe at implement time (runImplementForBranch worktree-prep try/catch escalates on a clone failure). resolveAutoImplement(masterAllows, envModeFallback, settings) → {enabled: masterAllows && ai?.enabled===true, mode: ai?.mode ?? envModeFallback}; built per project per tick into resolvedByProject Map via getProject, FAIL-SAFE to {enabled:false} on any throw. Threaded autoImpl:{enabled,mode} into runAnsweringSession/runImplementForBranch/runImplementSession/runDriveSession/advanceArc (every deps.autoImplement* → autoImpl.*); the in-flight-arc probe gate + the reclaim pendingLand stall now read the per-project Map. api-client getProject(projectId). CHURN: FakeClient.getProject defaults {enabled:true} MODE-OMITTED so resolution collapses to the old deps values ⇒ existing test bodies UNTOUCHED; config.test updated (master flip + git-url ConfigError removed); responder-seal write-path seals seeded createTestProject({settings:{autoImplement:{enabled:true,mode:on|shadow}}}). responder 206 (+12), server 1732 (seals 11/11). build/typecheck/lint green. NO openapi/web/shared change. new-project⇒off, env-unset⇒defer-to-DB, fail-safe⇒off; A1-A5 byte-identical. d6e05ea.
phase_outcomes.P1: Schema + server plumbing. autoImplementSettingsSchema {enabled: bool default false, mode: enum AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODES default 'shadow'} added to shared projectSettingsSchema (Zod-3) + the Zod-4 route mirror in projects.ts, in lockstep (.optional() only, no .partial(), no .prefault — leaf scalars). AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODES=['off','shadow','on'] const added to shared enums.ts (no daemon dep, no coupling to LEASE/CACHE_MODES). mode default 'shadow' is the safe DB observe-first default (distinct from the env default 'on'). PATCH handler UNCHANGED — project.service.ts writes data.settings opaquely; the route validates against the mirror (absent sub-block Zod-stripped) so adding to the mirror is necessary+sufficient. openapi:export + generate:api regen (autoImplement on Create/Update bodies). Tests: absent⇒undefined (tolerant off, byte-identical); {}⇒defaults; partial fills mode; full round-trips; invalid mode 400. shared 519, server 1732 (incl. openapi-drift byte-seal). build/typecheck/lint green. No consumer yet. bf8e6e3.

notes: User opted to BUILD the per-project web settings UI (over env-only). Moves auto-implement enablement from daemon-wide env to per-project settings.autoImplement (default off, mode default shadow), composed with the env master kill-switch + deployment knobs (git url/budget/allowlist/verify stay env). P1 schema+server, P2 responder per-project resolution (load-bearing), P3 web page+nav, P4 seal+docs (fix the CLAUDE.md settings.integrator inaccuracy)+close. Safe-by-default; the whole A1-A5 arc stays byte-identical (only the enablement SOURCE moves). CAMPAIGN COMPLETE — per-project control is accurate, documented, sealed, and default-off. Branch off main; do NOT push until user approves.
